metadata.siteDescription: Practical notes about software architecture, Java, Spring Boot, Next.js, DevOps, and modern engineering.
metadata.aboutDescription: About Trung Nguyen and his engineering journey.

home.eyebrow: Engineering notes, systems thinking, practical delivery
home.title: A clean technical blog foundation for shipping ideas with
home.description: This workspace is prepared for future writing about software architecture, Java, Spring Boot, Next.js, DevOps, and modern engineering practice.
home.latestDescription: Recent technical writing from real engineering decisions and production trade-offs.
home.latestEmptyTitle: The writing pipeline is ready. Public notes will appear here as they are published.
home.latestEmptyDescription: Published posts will appear here automatically when the CMS public blog API returns data.
home.topicsTitle: Systems, platforms, and delivery disciplines that shape the writing direction.
home.philosophyDescription: I prefer systems that are understandable, observable, and built around clear contracts. The goal is not to chase patterns, but to choose structures that help products and teams grow without losing delivery speed.

blogPage.heading: Knowledge & Insights
blogPage.description: Sharing practical knowledge, real-world experiences, and insights on software engineering, system architecture, and modern technologies.
blogPage.emptyTitle: The content pipeline is ready. The public article list is currently empty.
blogPage.emptyDescription: Published CMS posts will appear here automatically when the public blog API returns data.

tagsPage.heading: Browse technical notes by topic.
tagsPage.description: Tags are generated from published blog frontmatter and grouped into stable public URLs.
tagsPage.emptyTitle: Published posts will generate public tag pages automatically.
tagsPage.emptyDescription: Draft entries stay excluded, so only published frontmatter affects the tag index.
tagsPage.noVisiblePostsTitle: This tag exists, but there are no visible posts attached to it.

footer.primary: Sharing practical knowledge, real-world experiences, and insights on software engineering, system architecture, and modern technologies.
footer.secondary: Thanks for stopping by. I hope these articles help you in your work and learning journey.
